title: A Flash of Insight
description: A partial encyclopedia article lists three ingredients on the same aspect. Use the supporting clues to identify the fourth.

hints.text: The article on the R aspect has three known entries: ingredients [2, 5, 6] all have R+. There are exactly 4 alchemicals with R+. The fourth must be one of: [1, 3, 4, 7, 8]. Use the other clues to eliminate candidates.

Eliminate candidates:
  — ingredient 1: eliminated (eliminated by constraints)
  — ingredient 3: survives
  — ingredient 4: eliminated (eliminated by constraints)
  — ingredient 7: eliminated (eliminated by constraints)
  — ingredient 8: eliminated (eliminated by constraints)
Only ingredient 3 remains. It is alchemical pnP, which has R+. It is the missing fourth entry.
